zh.lifeSummary: Richard Basset是John Basset和Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet的兒子，出生。他於1567年2月14日與Agnes Jeffes在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯托克頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和9個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Basset是John Basset和Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet的儿子，出生。他于1567年2月14日与Agnes Jeffes在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯托克頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和9个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Basset was born as the son of John Basset and Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. He married Agnes Jeffes on 14 February 1567, in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 9 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Basset est né, fils de John Basset et Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. Il a épousé Agnes Jeffes le 14 février 1567, à Stockton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 9 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Basset wurde, als Sohn von John Basset und Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet geboren. Er hat am 14. Februar 1567 in Stockton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Jeffes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 9 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Basset è nato il come figlio di John Basset e Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. Lui sposato Agnes Jeffes il 14 febbraio 1567, nel Stockton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 9 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard BassetはJohn BassetとLady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenetの息子として生まれた。1567年2月14日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストクトンでAgnes Jeffesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Basset(은)는 John Basset(와)과 Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1567년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톡턴에서 Agnes Jeffes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Basset nasceu filho de John Basset e Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. Ele casou-se com Agnes Jeffes em 14 de fevereiro de 1567, em Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 9 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Basset родился. Его родителей звали John Basset и Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Jeffes 14 февраля 1567 г. в местности стокктон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 9 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Basset nació como hijo de John Basset y Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet. Se casó con Agnes Jeffes el 14 de febrero de 1567, en Stockton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 9 hijas.
